data.name: Horny Housewives
data.detailed_description:
Join our Discord


關於此遊戲

Horny Housewives is a Open World RPG that allows you to play in a suburban setting that involves a high-stakes world of betrayal, mystery, and adventure. Help attractive women in a suburban neighborhood with their daily tasks, solve puzzles, and make choices that will affect the story.


High definition animations and a 3D real time engine for a truly immersive experience.
A complex and engaging storyline with multiple endings.
A variety of attractive female characters to interact with.
Challenging puzzles and minigames to solve.
Choices that matter: your decisions will affect the story and the relationships you build with the other characters.


The game is played from a third-person perspective. You can explore the neighborhood, interact with other characters, and complete quests. The game features a variety of activities, including:

Helping the housewives with their daily tasks, such as cooking, cleaning, and shopping.
Solving puzzles and minigames to earn rewards.
Making choices that will affect the story and the relationships you build with the other characters.


The game is set in a suburban neighborhood where the housewives are desperate for excitement and adventure. You will play as single father who has just moved into the neighborhood. You will quickly learn that the neighborhood is not as perfect as it seems. The housewives are hiding secrets, and there is a dark underbelly to the community.

You will need to use your skills and your cunning to help the housewives and solve the mysteries of the neighborhood. But be careful, the housewives are not as innocent as they seem. They are all desperate for something, and they will do whatever it takes to get it.

Horny Housewives is a unique and engaging RPG game that is sure to appeal to fans of the genre. With its high definition animations, 3D real time engine, and complex storyline, Horny Housewives is a must-play for both casual gamers and RPG Fans alike.

data.short_description: Horny Housewives is a Open World RPG that allows you to play in a suburban setting that involves a high-stakes world of betrayal, mystery, and adventure. Help attractive women in a suburban neighborhood with their daily tasks, solve puzzles, and make choices that will affect the story.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 1.6 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce 980 and higher ; ATI radeon and higher
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.4 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 equivalent or greater ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MACOS 11 or newer
  • 處理器: 1.6Ghz equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Processor
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: MACOS 11 or newer
  • 處理器: 2.4 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce 1080 and higher ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher

  • Sound Card: integrated or higher
